final_answer: Individuals with symptoms of COVID-19 should consider getting tested to confirm infection. Testing is essential for those who believe they may be infected with COVID-19. Health care providers can perform accurate PCR tests for COVID-19 diagnosis. A positive antigen test indicates an active COVID-19 infection. Those diagnosed with COVID-19 should stay home and seek medical care if necessary. Test for COVID-19 if you have symptoms of the illness. If you have symptoms of COVID-19, you should get tested to confirm the infection.
